name: @radzor/invoice-generator
description: Generate PDF invoices from structured data. Build invoices with line items, customer info, tax calculations, and export as PDF buffers or structured JSON.

inputs.name: companyName
inputs.description: Your company or business name for the invoice header.

inputs.name: companyAddress
inputs.description: Your company address for the invoice header.

inputs.name: taxRate
inputs.description: Default tax rate as a percentage (e.g. 20 for 20%).

outputs.name: invoicePdf
outputs.description: Generated PDF invoice as a Node.js Buffer.

outputs.name: invoiceData
outputs.description: Structured invoice data with totals and line items.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Array of line items with description, quantity, unit price, and total.

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Sum of all line item totals before tax.

events.name: onGenerated
events.description: Fired when a PDF invoice is successfully generated.

actions.name: generate
actions.description: Generate the PDF invoice from accumulated line items and customer info. Returns the PDF buffer and structured data.

actions.name: addLineItem

params.name: unitPrice
params.description: Price per unit in the configured currency.

actions.description: Add a line item to the current invoice.

actions.name: setCustomer

params.name: name
params.description: Customer full name or company name.

actions.description: Set the customer details for the invoice.

llm.constraints: Server-side only. PDF generation requires pdfkit. Line items must be added before calling generate(). Customer must be set before generating.
